Header file declaring functions for JavaScript execution and control in an embedded environment.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that declares functions for executing and managing JavaScript code within an embedded environment. The function [`js_entry`](<#js_entry>) initializes the JavaScript engine with a given source code and its size. The [`js_eval`](<#js_eval>) function evaluates the provided JavaScript source code. The [`js_loop`](<#js_loop>) function is likely used to process or manage execution cycles based on a given tick count. Finally, the [`js_exit`](<#js_exit>) function is used to terminate or clean up the JavaScript execution environment. These functions facilitate the integration of JavaScript execution capabilities into C-based applications.
